positive: A minimalist, geometric illustration of a soaring phoenix made of stained glass and gold filigree, designed for high contrast apparel printing. The phoenix is centralized, depicted in a powerful upward motion, with intricate, tessellated feather patterns creating strong negative space against a deep navy background. Use a color palette of burnt orange, vibrant gold, sapphire blue, and deep indigo. The style should blend Art Nouveau aesthetics with modern geometric simplicity, ensuring clean lines, strong silhouettes, and flat areas of color suitable for screen printing. Clean vector look, perfect for large-format print.
negative: blur, noisy, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame, photographic, hyperrealistic, gradient sky, shadows, clutter
